message:
fix(ci): Enable include-hidden-files for upload-artifact

The .checksums/ directory is a hidden folder (starts with .) and
actions/upload-artifact@v4 excludes hidden files by default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -238,6 +238,7 @@ jobs:
           path: .checksums/
           retention-days: 7
           if-no-files-found: error
+          include-hidden-files: true
 
   sign-and-commit:
     name: Sign & Commit Checksums
@@ -392,3 +393,4 @@ jobs:
           path: .checksums/
           retention-days: 90
           if-no-files-found: error
+          include-hidden-files: true
